name: Washington Cherry Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Maraschino cherries (coarsely-chopped, drained, rinsed and patted dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
2. Combine brown sugar, shortening, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended.
3. Beat egg into creamed mixture.
4. Combine flour, salt, and baking soda. Mix into creamed mixture just until blended. Stir in white chocolate chips and cherries.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 3 inches (7 cm) apart onto ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake one baking sheet at a time at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 10 minutes for chewy cookies, or 11 to 13 minutes for crisp cookies. Do not over bake. Cool 2 minutes on baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely. Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
